creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rm
Date: Sat Jan 12 12:16:03 2013
New Revision: 310269
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/310269

Log:
  - unbreak by updating to 6.05
  - update master site
  - add license (GPLv2)
  - add simple rc-script
  
  PR:		174068
  Submitted by:	Alex Stangl <alex@stangl.us> (maintainer)

Added:
  head/www/geneweb/files/gwd.in   (contents, props changed)
Deleted:
  head/www/geneweb/files/patch-tools_Makefile.inc.unix
Modified:
  head/www/geneweb/Makefile
  head/www/geneweb/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/geneweb/files/patch-Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/geneweb/files/pkg-message.in   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/geneweb/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/geneweb/pkg-plist

Modified: head/www/geneweb/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/geneweb/Makefile	Sat Jan 12 12:13:39 2013	(r310268)
+++ head/www/geneweb/Makefile	Sat Jan 12 12:16:03 2013	(r310269)
@@ -2,27 +2,32 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	geneweb
-PORTVERSION=	5.02
+PORTVERSION=	6.05
 CATEGORIES=	www
-MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.inria.fr/INRIA/Projects/cristal/geneweb/Src/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://opensource.geneanet.org/attachments/download/190/
+DISTNAME=	gw-${PORTVERSION}-src
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
 
 MAINTAINER=	alex@stangl.us
 COMMENT=	Advanced genealogy software
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	ocamlc:${PORTSDIR}/lang/ocaml \
 		camlp5:${PORTSDIR}/devel/ocaml-camlp5
 
-BROKEN=		does not build
-
 HAS_CONFIGURE=	yes
 
 MAN1=		ged2gwb.1 gwb2ged.1 gwc.1 gwc2.1 gwu.1 gwd.1 consang.1 gwsetup.1
 
 SUB_FILES+=	pkg-message
+USE_RC_SUBR=	gwd
 
 post-install:
+	(cd ${INSTALL_WRKSRC} && ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${MAKE} ${MAKE_FLAGS} ${MAKEFILE} distrib)
 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/etc/a.gwf ${PREFIX}/share/geneweb
+	${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/geneweb/distribution
+	${CP} -a ${WRKSRC}/distribution ${PREFIX}/share/geneweb/
 	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${FILESDIR}/install.sh ${PREFIX}/share/geneweb
 	${CHMOD} -R go+r  ${PREFIX}/share/geneweb ${_MANPAGES}
 	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}

==============================================================================

+++ head/www/geneweb/distinfo	Sat Jan 12 12:16:03 2013	(r310269)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (geneweb-5.02.tgz) = 8be9ce98883043d5e6e1e473e3bb3c2c18920cd6ad60192e859101f472385704
-SIZE (geneweb-5.02.tgz) = 1419164
+SHA256 (gw-6.05-src.tgz) = 78603491a288966cc630c4aac2e1507f08f190c5dee71ed0fcc01143bfb286ba
+SIZE (gw-6.05-src.tgz) = 3151826

Added: head/www/geneweb/files/gwd.in
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/geneweb/files/gwd.in	Sat Jan 12 12:16:03 2013	(r310269)
@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+#!/bin/sh
+#
+# PROVIDE: gwd
+# REQUIRE: DAEMON
+# BEFORE: LOGIN
+
+#
+# DO NOT CHANGE THESE DEFAULT VALUES HERE
+# SET THEM IN THE /etc/rc.conf FILE
+#
+gwd_enable=${gwd_enable-"NO"}
+gwd_flags=${gwd_flags-"-hd /home/geneweb/gw"}
+gwd_pidfile=${gwd_pidfile-"/home/geneweb/gwd.pid"}
+gwd_chdir=${gwd_chdir-"/home/geneweb/bases"}
+gwd_command=${gwd_command-"/usr/local/bin/gwd"}
+
+gwd_user=${gwd_user-"geneweb"}
+
+. /etc/rc.subr
+
+name="gwd"
+rcvar=`set_rcvar`
+command="${gwd_command}"
+pidfile="${gwd_pidfile}"
+
+load_rc_config $name
+
+start_cmd="echo \"Starting ${name}.\";cd ${gwd_chdir};su -m ${gwd_user} -c \"exec /usr/sbin/daemon -f -p ${pidfile} ${command} ${gwd_flags} ${command_args}\""
+#start_cmd="echo \"Starting ${name}.\"; /usr/bin/nice -5 ${command} ${gwd_flags} ${command_args}"
+
+run_rc_command "$1"
+

Modified: head/www/geneweb/files/patch-Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/geneweb/files/patch-Makefile	Sat Jan 12 12:13:39 2013	(r310268)
+++ head/www/geneweb/files/patch-Makefile	Sat Jan 12 12:16:03 2013	(r310269)
@@ -1,9 +1,9 @@
---- Makefile.orig	Thu Sep  8 22:56:51 2005
-+++ Makefile	Thu Sep  8 22:57:29 2005
+--- Makefile.orig	2012-06-04 02:56:55.000000000 -0500
++++ Makefile	2012-12-01 00:19:22.000000000 -0600
 @@ -1,6 +1,5 @@
- # $Id: Makefile,v 4.18 2004/07/01 14:00:24 ddr Exp $
-
+ # $Id: Makefile,v 5.7 2009-03-11 10:53:30 ddr Exp $
+ 
 -PREFIX=/usr
  LANGDIR=$(PREFIX)/share/geneweb
- DOCDIR=$(PREFIX)/share/geneweb/doc
  MANDIR=$(PREFIX)/man/man1
+ DESTDIR=distribution

Modified: head/www/geneweb/files/pkg-message.in
==============================================================================
--- head/www/geneweb/files/pkg-message.in	Sat Jan 12 12:13:39 2013	(r310268)
+++ head/www/geneweb/files/pkg-message.in	Sat Jan 12 12:16:03 2013	(r310269)
@@ -2,5 +2,18 @@
 
 In order to install GeneWeb in a user's public_html directory, please run:
 	%%DATADIR%%/install.sh
+OR from directory to install in, run:
+	cp -a %%DATADIR%%/distribution/ .
+	./gwsetup
+
+Sample rc-script %%PREFIX%%/etc/rc.d/gwd has been provided to help run gwd
+as a daemon process. Adjust it to suit your needs, and add gwd_enable="YES"
+to your /etc/rc.conf to enable gwd to run automatically upon reboot.
+
+Unfortunately, the documentation that was present with earlier GeneWeb
+versions has been dropped since 6.02. Please refer to the GeneWeb wiki
+http://opensource.geneanet.org/projects/geneweb/wiki
+and/or to the GeneWeb mailing list GeneWeb@yahoogroups.com if you need
+help.
 
 ==========================================================================

Modified: head/www/geneweb/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/www/geneweb/pkg-descr	Sat Jan 12 12:13:39 2013	(r310268)
+++ head/www/geneweb/pkg-descr	Sat Jan 12 12:16:03 2013	(r310269)
@@ -1,7 +1,8 @@
 GeneWeb is a genealogy software program with a Web interface
-developed by Daniel de Rauglaudre. It can be used off-line
+originally developed by Daniel de Rauglaudre, but currently
+maintained by fabien@geneanet.org. It can be used off-line
 or in a Web environment. It uses very efficient techniques
 of relationship and consanguinity computing, developed in
 collaboration with Didier Remy, research Director at INRIA.
 
-WWW: http://www.geneweb.org/
+WWW: http://opensource.geneanet.org/projects/geneweb/
